title: elaeocarpus stipularis var. nutans
intro: Elaeocarpus stipularis var. nutans, also known as the "Saraca" or "Sea Malt", is a plant species that belongs to the Elaeocarpaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, and has been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. The leaves and bark of Elaeocarpus stipularis var. nutans are used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
